---
title: ""
subtitle: "Copyright Raphaële Slimane, All Rights Reserved."


listing:
  contents: things
  type: grid
  image-height: "100%"
  sort-ui: [date,categories]
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 3
  page-size: 30
  grid-item-border: true
  fields: [image]
  categories: false
  #template: cards.ejs
  
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: litera
      dark: slate
    page-layout: article
---

<p id="artwork-count" class="artwork-count"></p>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  var el = document.getElementById("artwork-count");
  var count = document.querySelectorAll("#listing-listing .quarto-grid-item").length;
  if (el && count > 0) {
    el.textContent = "Nombre de dessins, peintures et autres illustrations, gribouillis, etc : " + count;
  }
});
</script>

::: {#listing}
:::
